tasks.title: Inventory stated contributions
tasks.completion_predicate: The dossier contains stable, anchored contribution items and explicitly records any ambiguity in stated contributions.

tasks.title: Map claims methods and dependencies
tasks.completion_predicate: Major claims, supporting items, methods, dependencies, scope, and centrality are anchored and cross-reference existing dossier IDs.

tasks.title: Inventory equations theorems and assumptions
tasks.completion_predicate: Equation, theorem, and assumption inventories are anchored and theorem-to-assumption relationships resolve.

tasks.title: Inventory experiments and reported results
tasks.completion_predicate: Experiments, datasets, splits, baselines, metrics, and reported results are anchored with internally resolvable relationships.

tasks.title: Inventory reproducibility and references
tasks.completion_predicate: Reproducibility materials and reference entries are present, anchored, and limited to the verified bundle.

tasks.title: Inventory limitations risks and ambiguities
tasks.completion_predicate: Limitations, ethical-risk triggers, ambiguities, missing information, and empty-category explanations are explicit and anchored where paper-derived.

tasks.title: Validate and publish paper dossier
tasks.completion_predicate: A validated paper-dossier.json identifies the verified bundle, contains every required inventory, resolves all anchors and cross-references, and makes no acceptance judgment.
